reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question asked: 'Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup...?' (How much revenue did Teckentrup have?). The user is asking for total earnings per year (2021-2024), but the chart displays monthly revenue data overlaid on top of each other. This makes it impossible to directly read or compare the total annual figures without performing mental arithmetic or external calculation. Furthermore, plotting four years of monthly data on a single X-axis (Jan-Dec) creates significant visual clutter and overlap (especially between 2022 and 2023 peaks), obscuring trends rather than clarifying them. A bar chart comparing the summed totals per year would be far more effective.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a Bar Chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the Y-axis represents the Summed Revenue for that year. Add data labels showing the exact total value for each year.
